ham.subject: Ticket #12345 Resolved – Action Required?
ham.body:
Hi Team,

I hope you are doing well. I am writing to inform you that Jira ticket #12345 "Update User Permissions" has been resolved in the latest sprint. The changes have been deployed to the staging environment and are now ready for final review.

Please review the changes at your earliest convenience:
- Verify that the new permission settings are applied correctly.
- Test the user flow for the affected roles.
- Provide any feedback or approval so we can merge into production.

If you encounter any issues, feel free to open a new sub‑ticket or ping me directly on Slack. Your prompt review will help us keep the release schedule on track.

Thanks for your cooperation!

Best regards,
Arun Patel
Software Engineer
Acme Corp

spam.subject: Important: Immediate Action Required – Microsoft 365 Password Expiry
spam.body:
Dear User,

This is a security alert from Microsoft Office 365. Your account password is set to expire in 72 hours. To avoid any disruption in your services, you must reset your password immediately.

Please click the link below to verify your account and reset your password:
<URL>

Failure to comply may result in temporary suspension of your account until the password is updated. This action is required to comply with our updated security policies.

Thank you for your prompt attention to this matter.

Regards,
Microsoft Security Team
